_meta.description: Pinned regression fixture — complex01 seed=42 n=500. Re-pinned 2026-04-20 after fixing the build_main_to_sub_mapping unit bug: `asi8` on a `datetime64[us, UTC]` index returns microseconds, but the mapping function was adding `bar_ns` (nanoseconds), widening each main-TF bar's inner sub-loop from ~60 M1 bars to ~40,000 M1 bars (~41 days). max_bars / stale / H1-level checks were silently bypassed. Fix in ff/harness.py::build_main_to_sub_mapping normalises both indexes to datetime64[ns, UTC] before searchsorted. Complex01's best trial happens to have stale+max_bars enabled, so the pinned metrics shifted substantially (181→33 trades). Results are now semantically correct. Previous values (before fix): trades=181, win=72.93, pips=1285, expectancy=7.10.
